content:
# Terms of Service

Welcome to Static Website Generator (SWG). By accessing or using our platform, you agree to these Terms of Service.

## Acceptance of Terms

By using SWG, you agree to comply with these terms and all applicable laws and regulations.

## Use of the Platform

You may use SWG to create, manage and publish static websites in accordance with these terms.

## User Responsibilities

You are responsible for the content you create and publish using the platform. You agree not to use SWG for unlawful or harmful activities.

## Intellectual Property

Unless otherwise stated, all software, branding and documentation related to SWG remain the intellectual property of their respective owners.

## Disclaimer

SWG is provided on an "as is" basis without warranties of any kind. We do our best to provide a reliable platform but cannot guarantee uninterrupted availability.

## Changes to These Terms

We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. Continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of any updated terms.

## Contact

If you have any questions regarding these Terms of Service, please contact us through the contact page.
